description: Configure a three-tier alert escalation system in ManageEngine OpManager. Create three notification profiles: (1) Name 'L1-Operations-Alert' — email recipient ops-l1@company.internal, triggered for Critical and Trouble severity device alerts; (2) Name 'L2-NOC-Escalation' — email recipient noc-escalation@company.internal, triggered for Critical severity only; (3) Name 'L3-Management-Notify' — email recipient it-management@company.internal, triggered for Device Down events. Navigate to Settings > Notifications > Notification Profiles in OpManager to create each profile. Credentials: admin/Admin@123 at http://localhost:8060.
